name: log_call_information
description: Log all structured information captured during the call. Call this at the end of every completed call before closing.

caller_name.description: Full name of the caller as provided

phone_number.description: Caller's callback phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +12125550100)

patient_type.description: Whether this is a new or returning patient

reason_for_visit.description: Non-diagnostic reason for visit as described by caller. Do NOT include medical history, diagnosis, or insurance details.

intended_visit_timeframe.description: When the patient plans to visit. Prefer 1-hour windows (e.g. '3pm to 4pm tomorrow'). Use broader timeframe if caller cannot narrow down.

visit_timeframe_confirmed.description: True if caller confirmed a specific 1-hour window. False if only a broad timeframe was captured.

sms_consent.description: True if caller explicitly said yes to receiving a confirmation SMS

feedback_consent.description: True if caller agreed to receive the post-visit feedback SMS question

existing_appointment_id.description: Only for change/cancel calls. The confirmation number or phone number used to identify existing visit.

appointment_intent.description: Whether caller is booking new, changing, or cancelling

callback_requested.description: True if caller asked staff to follow up with them

callback_message.description: Brief non-medical message caller wants to leave for staff. Omit if none.

name: flag_emergency
description: Flag that an emergency was detected during this call. Call this IMMEDIATELY when any emergency indicator is detected — do not wait until the end of the call.

detected_keywords.description: The specific words or phrases that triggered emergency detection

is_mental_health_crisis.description: True if the emergency involves suicidal ideation or self-harm

caller_phone.description: Caller phone number if already captured, otherwise omit

transcript_excerpt.description: The specific statement made by the caller that triggered detection (max 200 chars)

name: flag_spam
description: Flag this call as spam, robocall, or irrelevant. Call this when the caller is clearly not a patient.

notes.description: Optional brief description of what was said that indicated spam

name: schedule_soft_appointment
description: Log a soft scheduling entry for a patient's intended visit. This does NOT create a hard appointment — it logs the timeframe in Keragon and triggers appointment reminders.

phone_number.description: Patient's phone number in E.164 format

intended_visit_datetime.description: ISO 8601 datetime of intended visit if a specific time was confirmed (e.g. '2026-03-01T15:00:00'). Omit if only a broad timeframe was given.

intended_visit_description.description: Human-readable timeframe as stated by caller (e.g. 'tomorrow afternoon', '3pm to 4pm on Friday')

timeframe_confirmed.description: True if caller confirmed a specific 1-hour window

intent.description: Whether this is a new visit, a change to existing, or a cancellation

existing_appointment_id.description: Required for change/cancel intent. Confirmation number or identifying info from caller.

sms_reminders_enabled.description: True if caller consented to SMS reminders (day-before and 1-hour-before)

name: request_callback
description: Log a callback request from a caller who wants a staff member to follow up with them during business hours.

phone_number.description: Phone number to call back, in E.164 format

message.description: Brief non-medical message or topic caller wants to discuss. Do NOT include medical history, symptoms in detail, or diagnostic information.
